versions.version_description: I've added the fingerpicking tabs for the intro and 1st part of the song and the power chords.
I figure ut the picking and strumming part. there is no version like this.
This tab is the solo acoustic version. The chorus are played with open strumming while the verses are muted with the strumming hand.

tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb
content:
Shawn Mendes - Stitches
Flat tune 

Intro    [ch]Bm[/ch]   |[ch]A[/ch]    |[ch]D[/ch]    |[ch]G[/ch]    ||


Verse 1
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
 I thought that I've been hurt before[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]  
 But no one's ever left me quite this sore[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
 Your words cut deeper than a knife[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
 Now I need someone to breathe me back to life[/tab]
 
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch] 
 Got a feeling that I'm going under but I know that I'll make it out alive[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]        N.C. 
 If I quit calling you my lover, move on[/tab]
 

Chorus
[tab]                [ch]Bm[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
 You watch me bleed until I can't breathe, I'm shaking, falling onto my knees[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]   
 And now that I'm without your kisses, I'll be needing stitches [/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
 Tripping over myself, aching, begging you to come help[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]   
 And now that I'm without your kisses I'll be needing stitches[/tab]


Verse 2
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
 Just like a moth drawn to a flame[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]  
 Oh, you lured me in, I couldn't sense the pain[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch] 
 Your bitter heart cold to the touch[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
 Now I'm gonna reap what I sow I'm left seeing red on my own[/tab]
                 
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch] 
 Got a feeling that I'm going under but I know that I'll make it out alive[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]        N.C. 
 If I quit calling you my lover, move on[/tab]
 

Chorus
[tab]                [ch]Bm[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
 You watch me bleed until I can't breathe, I'm shaking, falling onto my knees[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]   
 And now that I'm without your kisses, I'll be needing stitches [/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
 Tripping over myself, aching, begging you to come help[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]   
 And now that I'm without your kisses I'll be needing stitches[/tab]

Interlude    [ch]Bm[/ch]   |[ch]A[/ch]    |[ch]D[/ch]    |[ch]G[/ch]    ||


Bridge 
[tab]  [ch]Bm[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]
 Needle and the thread, gotta get you out of my head[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
 Needle and the thread, gonna wind up dead[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bm[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]
 Needle and the thread, gotta get you out of my head[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
 Needle and the thread, gonna wind up dead[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bm[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]
 Needle and the thread, gotta get you out of my head[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
 Needle and the thread, gonna wind up dead[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]Bm[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]                    N.C.                      
 Needle and the thread, gotta get you out of my head, get you out of my head[/tab]
 

Chorus
[tab]                [ch]Bm[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
 You watch me bleed until I can't breathe, I'm shaking, falling onto my knees[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]   
 And now that I'm without your kisses, I'll be needing stitches [/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
 Tripping over myself, aching, begging you to come help[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]   
 And now that I'm without your kisses I'll be needing stitches (and now that)[/tab]

 N.C.
 I'm without your kisses I'll be needing stitches (and now that)

 I'm without your kisses I'll be needing stitches
